class.name: ResonanceRuntimeConfig
class.brief_description: Runtime configuration resource for Nexus Resonance. Structure aligned with Steam Audio Settings.
class.description: Nexus Resonance runtime configuration resource. Create or link in ResonanceRuntime node (Add Child Node > ResonanceRuntime). Structure and group order follow Steam Audio Settings: HRTF Settings, Ray Tracer Settings, Occlusion Settings, Real-time Reflections, Baked Reverb, Baked Pathing, Simulation Update, Reflection Effect, Hybrid Reverb, Reverb Output, Physics. Emits reflection_type_changed and pathing_enabled_changed when those settings change.

method.name: get_effective_realtime_rays
method.description: Returns effective realtime_rays for the given OS. Android has no Embree, so always 0.

method.name: get_config
method.description: Returns config dictionary for init_audio_engine. Includes sample_rate from AudioServer.

method.name: create_default
method.description: Creates a default runtime config for editor/fallback when no ResonanceRuntime in scene.

members.member: Steam Audio block size (256/512/1024). 256 = lower latency, more CPU. Match Godot's mix callback for best performance.
Ambisonic order for reverb encoding: 1st Order, 2nd Order, or 3rd Order. Higher = more spatial detail, more CPU.
Max reverb tail duration in seconds.
Realtime raytracing rays: 0 (baked only), 64–8192. Requires Embree on host.
Realtime reflection bounces (1–64).
Use Radeon Rays instead of Embree for GPU-accelerated raytracing.
Min distance for irradiance sampling (0.05–10.0 m). Only when Realtime Rays > 0.
Reverb tail length for realtime simulation (0.1–10.0 s).
Diffuse samples per reflection point (8–64).
Reverb algorithm: Convolution (0), Parametric (1), Hybrid (2).
Hybrid reverb: length (seconds) of IR used for convolution before parametric tail. Only when reflection_type is Hybrid.
Hybrid reverb: overlap percent (0–100) for crossfade between convolution and parametric parts.
Apply binaural rendering to reverb.
Use virtual surround instead of HRTF.
Custom SOFA HRTF. Import .sofa as .tres-file. Null = default embedded HRTF.
Use bilinear HRTF interpolation.
Baked reverb influence radius in meters.
Max reverb distance (0 = unlimited).
How much transmission damps reverb (0–1). 0 = no damping, 1 = full damping (reverb scaled by material transmission).
Enable pathing (multi-path propagation).
Transmission: FreqIndependent (0), FreqDependent (1).
Occlusion: Raycast (0), Volumetric (1).
Throttle geometry updates: apply every Nth update (1–16). Reduces CPU with animated objects.
Throttle simulation tick: run every Nth frame (1–8).
Direct sound runs every tick; Reflections + Pathing only when this many seconds elapsed. 0 = every tick (smoother pathing, more CPU). 0.1 = 100ms default.
Fraction of CPU cores for realtime raytracing (0–1). 0.05 = 5% of cores. Higher = smoother, more CPU.
Enable perspective correction for reverb.
Perspective correction factor (0.5–2.0).
